name: Seared Tuna on a Bed of Leaf Lettuce (Hl)
recipeIngredient: Scallions, 3 thinly sliced (white and firm green parts)
Ginger, grated fresh, 1 tablespoon (or ground ginger, 1 teaspoon)
Pineapple, peeled and cored, diced (about 4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the greens: Remove the outer leaves and any blemished leaves. Tear the leaves in half, and wash.
2. Combine tuna, lemon juice, salt, and olive oil. Let marinate while preparing salsa.
3. Prepare the salsa: In a saute pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add scallions, jalapeno peppers, and ginger. Heat until aroma is released (1 to 2 minutes). Add orange juice and reduce slightly (3 to 4 minutes). Add pineapple, herbs, and seasonings. Remove from heat and toss.
4. In a nonstick pan, sear the tuna on both sides for 4 to 6 minutes, depending on desired doneness.
5. Prepare garnish: Heat olive oil to smoking point and set aside.
6. Assemble the salad: Toss greens with enough vinaigrette dressing to coat evenly. Mound greens along bottoms of plates with salsa in middle. Lean tuna fillet over salsa. Place sliced scallions on top, drizzling with heated olive oil, wilting them and adding aroma.
Note:
Wear plastic gloves when handling jalapeno peppers to avoid burns.
Yield: 4 servings
